title: PH_lite_shader
description: A vibrant and lightweight Minecraft shaderpack built for performance and color.
body: Hello! This is my first ever shader (WARNING: It have a tons of bugs). You can use it as fullbright! (Yes, that is a bug i encountered but i like it!). This is not a realistic shader! The PH_lite_shader is very simple and also vibrant! I tried my best to make this but i know the fact it looks like minecraft lighting but more simple.
